flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 21% at Western Connecticut State University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (3.4k vs 4.4k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Connecticut State University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.8k → $13.4k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Western Connecticut State University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (4.0k → 3.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Connecticut State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
